metadata.title: 6. Wired, Wireless Technologies, Internet, Browsers, Apps, Cloud Computing

questions.question: What is the full form of ADSL?
questions.explanation: Asymmetric digital subscriber line (ADSL) is a type of digital subscriber line technology. It is a data communications technology which enables faster data transmission. It uses copper telephone lines.

questions.question: An Autoresponder is a_______on mail server that automatically replies to e-mails?
questions.explanation: An autoresponder is a computer program that automatically answers e-mail sent to it. They can be very simple or quite complex. The first autoresponders were created within mail transfer agents that found they could not deliver an e-mail to a given address.

questions.question: A DSLAM is a device used by Internet Service Providers (ISPs) to route incoming DSL connections to the Internet. What is its correct full form?
questions.explanation: A digital subscriber line access multiplexer is a network device which is located in telephone exchanges. It connects multiple customer digital subscriber line interfaces to a high-speed digital communications channel using multiplexing techniques.

questions.question: Which among the following defines web2.0 most precisely?

options.label: B
options.text: A Series of technological improvements in World Wide Web

options.label: C
options.text: A New labeling of old Softwares improved

answer.label: B
answer.text: A Series of technological improvements in World Wide Web

questions.explanation: It is the second stage of internet. Web 2.0 refers to websites that emphasize user-generated content, ease of use, participatory culture and interoperability (i.e., compatible with other products, systems, and devices) for end users.

questions.question: BSNL, Reliance, Shaw cable, AOL, Tata Indicom all can be kept in which one of the following groups?
